description.en: Start an async crawl of a website following links across multiple pages. Returns a job ID to track progress.
description.de: Starte einen asynchronen Crawl einer Website über mehrere Seiten. Gibt eine Job-ID zur Fortschrittsverfolgung zurück.

description.en: Scrape web pages, crawl entire websites, search the web, and map site structures. Extract clean markdown, HTML, and structured data from any URL with AI-powered web intelligence.
description.de: Scrape Webseiten, crawle ganze Websites, durchsuche das Web und mappe Site-Strukturen. Extrahiere sauberes Markdown, HTML und strukturierte Daten von jeder URL mit KI-gestützter Web-Intelligenz.

description.en: Start an async crawl of a website following links across multiple pages. Returns a job ID to track progress.
description.de: Starte einen asynchronen Crawl einer Website über mehrere Seiten. Gibt eine Job-ID zur Fortschrittsverfolgung zurück.

vars.API_KEY: env:FIRECRAWL_API_KEY|Get your API key from the Firecrawl Dashboard at firecrawl.dev.

inputs.name: URL
inputs.description: The starting URL of the website to crawl.

inputs.name: Max Depth
inputs.description: Maximum depth to crawl (how many link levels deep from the start URL).

inputs.name: Page Limit
inputs.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl.

success.en: Crawl job started. Use job ID to check status.
success.de: Crawl-Job gestartet. Job-ID zum Statusabruf verwenden.

description.en: Discover and list all URLs on a website. Useful for understanding site structure or finding specific pages.
description.de: Entdecke und liste alle URLs einer Website. Nützlich zum Verstehen der Site-Struktur oder zum Finden bestimmter Seiten.

description.en: Scrape web pages, crawl entire websites, search the web, and map site structures. Extract clean markdown, HTML, and structured data from any URL with AI-powered web intelligence.
description.de: Scrape Webseiten, crawle ganze Websites, durchsuche das Web und mappe Site-Strukturen. Extrahiere sauberes Markdown, HTML und strukturierte Daten von jeder URL mit KI-gestützter Web-Intelligenz.

description.en: Discover and list all URLs on a website. Useful for understanding site structure or finding specific pages.
description.de: Entdecke und liste alle URLs einer Website. Nützlich zum Verstehen der Site-Struktur oder zum Finden bestimmter Seiten.

vars.API_KEY: env:FIRECRAWL_API_KEY|Get your API key from the Firecrawl Dashboard at firecrawl.dev.

inputs.name: URL
inputs.description: The URL of the website to map.

inputs.name: Search
inputs.description: Optional keyword to filter the discovered URLs.

inputs.name: Include Subdomains
inputs.description: Whether to include URLs from subdomains.

inputs.name: Limit
inputs.description: Maximum number of URLs to return.

description.en: Scrape a single web page and extract its content, metadata, and links as clean markdown.
description.de: Scrape eine einzelne Webseite und extrahiere ihren Inhalt, Metadaten und Links als sauberes Markdown.

description.en: Scrape web pages, crawl entire websites, search the web, and map site structures. Extract clean markdown, HTML, and structured data from any URL with AI-powered web intelligence.
description.de: Scrape Webseiten, crawle ganze Websites, durchsuche das Web und mappe Site-Strukturen. Extrahiere sauberes Markdown, HTML und strukturierte Daten von jeder URL mit KI-gestützter Web-Intelligenz.

description.en: Scrape a single web page and extract its content, metadata, and links as clean markdown.
description.de: Scrape eine einzelne Webseite und extrahiere ihren Inhalt, Metadaten und Links als sauberes Markdown.

vars.API_KEY: env:FIRECRAWL_API_KEY|Get your API key from the Firecrawl Dashboard at firecrawl.dev.

inputs.name: URL
inputs.description: The URL of the web page to scrape.

inputs.name: Wait For
inputs.description: Milliseconds to wait for the page to load before scraping (useful for JavaScript-heavy pages).

inputs.name: Include Tags
inputs.description: Comma-separated HTML tags to include in the response (e.g. article, main).

inputs.name: Exclude Tags
inputs.description: Comma-separated HTML tags to exclude from the response (e.g. nav, footer, script).

description.en: Search the web and extract content from relevant results.
description.de: Das Web durchsuchen und Inhalte aus relevanten Ergebnissen extrahieren.

description.en: Scrape web pages, crawl entire websites, search the web, and map site structures. Extract clean markdown, HTML, and structured data from any URL with AI-powered web intelligence.
description.de: Scrape Webseiten, crawle ganze Websites, durchsuche das Web und mappe Site-Strukturen. Extrahiere sauberes Markdown, HTML und strukturierte Daten von jeder URL mit KI-gestützter Web-Intelligenz.

description.en: Search the web and extract content from relevant results.
description.de: Das Web durchsuchen und Inhalte aus relevanten Ergebnissen extrahieren.

vars.API_KEY: env:FIRECRAWL_API_KEY|Get your API key from Firecrawl Dashboard.

inputs.name: Location
inputs.description: Geographic location to focus search results (e.g., 'United States', 'Germany').

inputs.name: Max Results
inputs.description: Maximum number of search results to return.

description.en: Set the billing address for a user. Required before generating an upgrade link. Pass a VAT ID to mark the account as a business (routes to Stripe instead of LemonSqueezy).
JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.
description.de: JoAi ist eine Plattform für das Erstellen und Verwalten eigener AI-Agenten.

warp.name: JoAi: Set Billing Address

description.en: Set the billing address for a user. Required before generating an upgrade link. Pass a VAT ID to mark the account as a business (routes to Stripe instead of LemonSqueezy).

warp.bot: Use this after creating a user to set their billing address before generating an upgrade link. The userId comes from the user-create warp output. Include vatId for business accounts.

inputs.name: User ID

description.en: The id of the user (from user-create output)

inputs.bot: The user's id returned by the user-create warp.

description.en: First name or company name
Last name or legal entity suffix
Two-letter ISO country code (e.g. DE, US)

inputs.name: VAT ID

description.en: VAT ID for business accounts (e.g. DE123456789)

inputs.bot: Optional. Providing a VAT ID marks the account as a business and routes payment through Stripe.

description.en: View the activity history for a contact.
JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.
description.de: JoAi ist eine Plattform für das Erstellen und Verwalten eigener AI-Agenten.

warp.name: JoAi: List Contact Activities

description.en: View the activity history for a contact.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants to see the history, activity log, or past interactions for a contact.

inputs.name: Contact ID

description.en: The ID of the contact

inputs.bot: The ID of the contact whose activity history to retrieve.

title.en: Add a note to a contact

description.en: Append a note to a contact's record.
description.de: Eine Notiz zum Kontaktdatensatz hinzufügen.

description.en: JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.
description.de: JoAi ist eine Plattform für das Erstellen und Verwalten eigener AI-Agenten.

warp.name: JoAi: Add Contact Note

title.en: Add a note to a contact

description.en: Append a note to a contact's record.
description.de: Eine Notiz zum Kontaktdatensatz hinzufügen.

warp.bot: Jot down context about a contact as you learn it from conversations. Use this passively — no need to ask the user for permission to take notes.

inputs.name: Contact ID

description.en: The ID of the contact
description.de: Die ID des Kontakts

inputs.bot: The ID of the contact to add the note to.

inputs.name: Note

description.en: The note to add
description.de: Die hinzuzufügende Notiz

inputs.bot: The note content — a brief piece of context learned about this contact.

description.en: Generate a checkout URL for upgrading a team to a paid plan. Routes to LemonSqueezy for consumers or Stripe for business accounts. Requires billing address to be set first.
JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.
description.de: JoAi ist eine Plattform für das Erstellen und Verwalten eigener AI-Agenten.

warp.name: JoAi: Generate Upgrade Link

description.en: Generate a checkout URL for upgrading a team to a paid plan. Routes to LemonSqueezy for consumers or Stripe for business accounts. Requires billing address to be set first.

warp.bot: Use this as the final step after user-create and billing-address-set. The teamSlug comes from the user-create warp output. Returns a direct checkout URL to send to the customer.

inputs.name: Team Slug

description.en: The team slug (from user-create output)

inputs.bot: The personalTeamSlug returned by the user-create warp.

inputs.name: Plan

description.en: The plan SKU to upgrade to

inputs.bot: The plan SKU. Use 'plus-monthly-00' for Plus monthly or 'plus-yearly-00' for Plus yearly.

description.en: Create a new user account with a personal team. Returns the user's id for use in subsequent steps.
JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.
description.de: JoAi ist eine Plattform für das Erstellen und Verwalten eigener AI-Agenten.

warp.name: JoAi: Create User

description.en: Create a new user account with a personal team. Returns the user's id for use in subsequent steps.

warp.bot: Use this when you need to create a new user account on behalf of an admin. The verified flag marks the email as verified immediately, skipping the email confirmation flow.

inputs.name: Email

description.en: The email address for the new user

inputs.bot: The user's email address. If a user with this email already exists, the existing user is returned.

inputs.name: Verified

description.en: Mark email as verified (skips email confirmation)

inputs.bot: Set to true to skip email verification for admin-created accounts. Requires admin token.

description.en: Retrieve the teams a user belongs to. Use this to get the personal team slug needed for generating an upgrade link.
JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.
description.de: JoAi ist eine Plattform für das Erstellen und Verwalten eigener AI-Agenten.

warp.name: JoAi: List User Teams

description.en: Retrieve the teams a user belongs to. Use this to get the personal team slug needed for generating an upgrade link.

warp.bot: Use this after user-create to get the user's personal team slug. Pass the userId from user-create output. The personal team is marked with personal: true.

inputs.name: User ID

description.en: The id of the user (from user-create output)

inputs.bot: The user's id returned by the user-create warp.

description.en: Critique a social media post, identify its weaknesses, then deliver an improved rewrite.
AI-powered social media content tools for writing, refining, and repurposing posts. Generate variations, sharpen hooks, match your voice, and more.
description.de: KI-gestützte Social-Media-Content-Tools zum Schreiben, Verfeinern und Wiederverwenden von Beiträgen.

warp.name: Social: Critique & Refine

description.en: Critique a social media post, identify its weaknesses, then deliver an improved rewrite.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants honest feedback and an improved version. Be direct in the critique — identify what is weak (hook, clarity, length, etc.) — then provide a refined rewrite.

description.en: The post you want critiqued and improved
Expand a short post into a fuller, more detailed piece of social media content.
AI-powered social media content tools for writing, refining, and repurposing posts. Generate variations, sharpen hooks, match your voice, and more.
description.de: KI-gestützte Social-Media-Content-Tools zum Schreiben, Verfeinern und Wiederverwenden von Beiträgen.

warp.name: Social: Expand

description.en: Expand a short post into a fuller, more detailed piece of social media content.

warp.bot: Use this when the user has a short idea or draft they want to flesh out. Add supporting points, examples, or context — but keep it suitable for social media, not a blog post.

description.en: The post you want to expand
Rewrite a social media post to be more direct, punchy, and scroll-stopping.
AI-powered social media content tools for writing, refining, and repurposing posts. Generate variations, sharpen hooks, match your voice, and more.
description.de: KI-gestützte Social-Media-Content-Tools zum Schreiben, Verfeinern und Wiederverwenden von Beiträgen.

warp.name: Social: Make Punchier

description.en: Rewrite a social media post to be more direct, punchy, and scroll-stopping.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants more energy and directness in a post. Tighten sentences, lead with the strongest idea, remove hedging language.

description.en: The post you want to make punchier
Condense a social media post while preserving its core message and impact.
AI-powered social media content tools for writing, refining, and repurposing posts. Generate variations, sharpen hooks, match your voice, and more.
description.de: KI-gestützte Social-Media-Content-Tools zum Schreiben, Verfeinern und Wiederverwenden von Beiträgen.

warp.name: Social: Make Shorter

description.en: Condense a social media post while preserving its core message and impact.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants to trim a post down. Cut ruthlessly — remove filler words, redundant phrases, and anything that doesn't add value. Keep the punch.

description.en: The post you want to shorten
Rewrite a post to match the author's personal voice and style as defined in the agent's character.
AI-powered social media content tools for writing, refining, and repurposing posts. Generate variations, sharpen hooks, match your voice, and more.
description.de: KI-gestützte Social-Media-Content-Tools zum Schreiben, Verfeinern und Wiederverwenden von Beiträgen.

warp.name: Social: Match Voice

description.en: Rewrite a post to match the author's personal voice and style as defined in the agent's character.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants to make a post sound more like them. Rely on the agent's character description for voice and style cues. Do not invent a style — only apply what is defined.

description.en: The post you want to rewrite in your voice
Rewrite only the opening line of a post to be more attention-grabbing and scroll-stopping.
AI-powered social media content tools for writing, refining, and repurposing posts. Generate variations, sharpen hooks, match your voice, and more.
description.de: KI-gestützte Social-Media-Content-Tools zum Schreiben, Verfeinern und Wiederverwenden von Beiträgen.

warp.name: Social: Optimize Hook

description.en: Rewrite only the opening line of a post to be more attention-grabbing and scroll-stopping.

warp.bot: Use this when the user only wants to improve the first line. Only rewrite the hook — leave the rest of the post unchanged. A strong hook creates curiosity, makes a bold claim, or speaks directly to a pain.

description.en: The post whose hook you want to optimize
Generate three distinct variations of a social media post from the same core message.
AI-powered social media content tools for writing, refining, and repurposing posts. Generate variations, sharpen hooks, match your voice, and more.
description.de: KI-gestützte Social-Media-Content-Tools zum Schreiben, Verfeinern und Wiederverwenden von Beiträgen.

warp.name: Social: Write Variations

description.en: Generate three distinct variations of a social media post from the same core message.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants to explore different angles or phrasings for a post. Return exactly 3 numbered variations, each on its own block.

description.en: The post you want to generate variations of
